prices.source_phrase: You can visit the Gores' 1806 Mansion by guided tour. View tour schedules and admission fees at Mansion Tours .
prices.source_block:
Take a Mansion Tour

You can visit the Gores' 1806 Mansion by guided tour. View tour schedules and admission fees at Mansion Tours .

hours.source_phrase: Our grounds are free and open to the public from dawn to dusk every day, unless there is a special event.
hours.source_block:
Our Grounds

Our grounds are free and open to the public from dawn to dusk every day, unless there is a special event. Parking is free. No pet dogs, please. See our map here .
